devdoc.details: Includes support for file sharing, metadata management, subscription payments, rewards, and revenue streams

returns.isActive: Boolean indicating if subscription is active

params._cid: The CID of the file to share
params._recipient: The address to share the file with

params.newOwner: The address of the new owner

params._duration: Duration in seconds the file should be considered valid
params._encryptedKey: Optional encryption key for private files
params._isPublic: Whether the file should be publicly accessible

devdoc.title: Decentralized File Vault Smart Contract

getSubscriptionDetails(address).notice: Get subscription details for a user

getUserRewards(address).notice: Get user's reward points and discount information

hasActiveSubscription(address).notice: Check if a user has an active subscription

purchaseSubscription(uint8).notice: Purchase or renew a subscription with potential discount

shareFile(string,address).notice: Share a file with another address

uploadFile(string,string,uint256,bool,st.notice: Upload a file record to the vault

userdoc.notice: Maps user wallet addresses to uploaded file CIDs stored via Lighthouse on IPFS/Filecoin
